items.description:

Introducing the LIMITED EDITION, Festive Holiday Hoodie! 

And you can get it right now. for a limited time only! FOR TOTALLY FREE!

Make sure you're in the official Anima Dev ROBLOX community, and join the festive looking game to obtain your freebie!

Merry Christmas! 🎄 - Crezza
